# TON Developer MCP

> Connect AI assistants to the TON blockchain via the Model Context Protocol. Query balances, deploy contracts, and search the full documentation without leaving your IDE.

TON Developer MCP exposes two servers via the Model Context Protocol (MCP):

## Servers

- **TON Docs** (remote, no install): `https://docs.ton.org/mcp`
  Read-only access to the full TON documentation over HTTP.

- **TON MCP Alpha** (local, via npx): `npx -y @ton/mcp@alpha`
  Live blockchain access — balances, transactions, contract deployment.

## Available Tools

- `ton_search_docs` — Search TON documentation
- `ton_get_balance` — Get wallet or contract balance
- `ton_send_transaction` — Send TON or Jetton transactions
- `ton_deploy_contract` — Deploy smart contracts (Jetton, NFT, custom)
- `ton_get_transactions` — Fetch transaction history for an address

## Setup (Claude Code)

```bash
claude mcp add --transport http ton-docs https://docs.ton.org/mcp
claude mcp add ton -- npx -y @ton/mcp@alpha
```

## Links

- Documentation: https://docs.ton.org/mcp
- Agentic Wallets: https://agents.ton.org
- Dashboard: https://agents.ton.org/dashboard
- TON Website: https://ton.org
